name: Kobold Warrior
description: A more experienced kobold warrior in crude armor, wielding a spiked club. More aggressive than typical kobolds.

attacks.name: Spiked Club
attacks.description: A vicious swing with a club studded with rusty nails

attacks.name: Thrown Spear
attacks.description: A crude spear thrown at short range

special_abilities.name: Pack Tactics
special_abilities.description: Gains +1 to attack rolls when adjacent to an ally

special_abilities.name: Aggressive
special_abilities.description: Will not retreat easily, fights more tenaciously

behavior.notes: More aggressive than scouts, prefers melee combat. Only retreats when critically wounded.
